immediate_actions: Remove 'Coming soon' and 'Planned Data Sections' from /data
Remove Sign In/Get Started from primary header nav
Noindex /ai-specialist OR add substantial public content
Verify all auth/dashboard pages are noindexed
sitemap_cleanup: Do NOT bulk-remove pages during Phase 32 experiment
Remove placeholders from sitemap (Phase 32 sitemap has 654 URLs, no polluted URLs per Phase 31.1)
Hold thin guide noindexing until Phase 32 Day 7 (Jun 25)
adsense_code_safety: No AdSense code currently deployed (only Adsterra)
When AdSense is added: EXCLUDE from noindex, auth, dashboard, /data (until fixed), /ai-specialist (unless fixed), lab pages
